title: Resolved Population & Housing refactor issues; validated the pipeline live
description: Implemented every flagged reliability, robustness, and efficiency fix for the Population & Housing pipeline — an immutable historical E-8 baseline with a Phase 0 builder and cold-start guard, hardened E-5 acquisition fallback, real per-row Source provenance, a per-vintage vacancy-rate correction, and a vectorized geographic classifier — then ran it end to end against the live 2020-2026 DoF E-5, fixing DoF's renamed workbook and its new per-county subtotal labels along the way.

title: Rewrote refactor guides as as-built docs
description: Turned the module 'refractor' planning docs into two-part as-built guides (non-technical overview plus per-function programmer reference with legacy lineage).

title: Graph editor & viz tool cleanups
description: Polish pass across the graph editor and standalone visualization tool: layout tweaks, control refinements, and small fixes carried over from the UI overhaul.

title: Added 'view original data' to the module visualization tool
description: New View Data step lets users inspect the underlying source rows behind a module chart before building a visualization.

title: Graph editor UI overhaul
description: Major restructuring of the graph editor interface, including multi-chart support, undo/redo, and the Range/dot-plot chart family.

title: Updated UI Kit to the official PPIC spec
description: Brought the living UI Kit in line with the official PPIC color and typography specification.

title: Implemented graph editor phases
description: Landed the phased graph-editor overhaul (step-wizard flow, encodings, presets) and synced the project spec.

title: Added pipeline logging + front-end Logs page
description: Introduced structured run-record logging in the Python pipelines and the /logs page that surfaces successes, recovered fallbacks, and failures.

title: Deleted unused components
description: Removed dead component files and refreshed the project spec accordingly.

title: Added document status fields; updated UI Kit colors
description: Added Status fields to documents, reworked UI Kit color tokens and their rendering.

title: Fixed the demographic projections pipeline
description: Tested and repaired the live Projections pipeline (DoF/Census scrapers, fallback re-aggregation, encoding and rename fixes).

title: Completed Building Permits refactor
description: Finished the Building Permits V3 refactor (backend, frontend, and CSV), pending validation.

title: Added document viewer + markdown rendering
description: New in-app document viewer with markdown rendering for the docs library.

title: Completed ACS Housing Stress refactor
description: Finished the ACS Housing Stress V3 refactor; tested ACS and Components of Change pipelines and fixed pytest.

title: Implemented demographic projections module
description: Initial implementation of the demographic projections module, pending validation.

title: Added report-a-bug button
description: Added a feedback entry point so users can report bugs from within the tool.
